nodes.label: Sanad Lawyer Interface Audit
nodes.summary: Arabic-language UI feature audit document titled 'تقييم واجهة المحامي – سند' (Sanad Lawyer Interface Evaluation). A structured table comparing what works vs. what is missing in the lawyer's daily workflow. Uses a four-status legend: Complete, Partial, Missing, Critical. Scores: 1 complete, 5 partial, 2 missing, 3 critical/broken. Concludes that the interface functions as a morning dashboard (alerts) but fails to close the loop on real daily tasks.

properties.title: تقييم واجهة المحامي – سند
properties.subtitle: ما الذي يعمل فعلاً vs ما الذي ينقص المحامي في عمله اليومي

nodes.label: Sanad Lawyer Interface Feature Audit
nodes.summary: Audit framework evaluating 11 features of the Sanad lawyer UI against real daily lawyer workflow needs. Identifies three critical missing features: client management (CRM), invoice creation, and communications log.

properties.conclusion: Interface works as a morning dashboard/alert system but does not close the loop on daily lawyer tasks

nodes.label: Morning Dashboard (لوحة التحكم الصباحية)
nodes.summary: Alerts + KPIs + daily summary. Status: Complete. Works excellently — alerts for late tasks, expired compliance, urgent cases.

nodes.label: Compliance Tracker (متتبع الامتثال)
nodes.summary: Tracks residency, commercial register, insurance, tax. Status: Partial. Can view/add/renew but cannot edit or delete items; no attachments support.

nodes.label: Cases Kanban Board (لوحة القضايا)
nodes.summary: Kanban drag-and-drop across 4 case stages. Status: Partial. Supports drag-and-drop between stages but lacks case detail page, edit/delete, and client is free text only.

nodes.label: Client Management / CRM (إدارة العملاء)
nodes.summary: CRM with separate contact records. Status: CRITICAL MISSING. No Client model exists at all; client is only a free-text field on cases. No client directory, no phone/email, no interaction history.

properties.detail: لا يوجد نموذج Client إطلاقاً. العميل مجرد نص في حقل القضية. لا دليل عملاء، لا هاتف/بريد، لا سجل تعاملات

nodes.label: Deep Work & Billing (العمل العميق والفوترة)
nodes.summary: Pomodoro timer + billable hours tracking. Status: Partial. Timer and hour logging work, but cannot create invoices from hours, cannot edit/delete records, meeting mode unavailable despite existing in DB.

missing: meeting mode (exists in DB but not exposed)

nodes.label: Invoice Creation (إنشاء الفواتير)
nodes.summary: Converting billable hours to invoices. Status: CRITICAL MISSING. No Invoice model. Hours are recorded but cannot be converted to invoices — the conversion loop is broken.

properties.detail: لا يوجد نموذج Invoice. الساعات تُسجّل لكن لا يمكن تحويلها إلى فاتورة. حلقة التحويل مكسورة

nodes.label: Task Management (إدارة المهام)
nodes.summary: Daily task lists + automatic follow-ups. Status: Partial. Can add/complete/filter tasks but cannot edit/delete, 'in progress' status unused, no subtasks.

nodes.label: Document Lifecycle (دورة حياة المستندات)
nodes.summary: Draft → Sent → Active → Expired document flow. Status: Partial. Status tracking and automatic task generation work, but no file attachments, no document templates, no edit/delete.

nodes.label: Communications Log (سجل الاتصالات)
nodes.summary: Log of calls, emails, meetings with clients. Status: CRITICAL MISSING. No communications log exists at all — lawyer manages client relationships entirely from memory, a professional liability risk.

properties.detail: لا يوجد سجل اتصالات إطلاقاً. المحامي يدير علاقته بالعميل في ذاكرته فقط — خطر مهني

nodes.label: Calendar / Session Appointments (التقويم / مواعيد الجلسات)
nodes.summary: Unified view of sessions and appointments. Status: Missing. No calendar exists; appointments are scattered across tasks, compliance, and cases with no unified view.

properties.detail: المواعيد منتشرة بين المهام والامتثال والقضايا بدون عرض موحد

nodes.label: Conflict of Interest Check (فحص تضارب المصالح)
nodes.summary: Conflict of interest check before accepting a new case. Status: Missing. Does not exist; a fundamental professional liability requirement.
